title: NukaCraft: Fallout mod
body: ![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxnA5ydI/images/396ceb05cb0f202ef26151811558b7d505eec81a.jpeg) # NukaCraft **Warning: This mod is in alpha stage! It has bugs and is not suitable for survival.** NukaCraft will bring some nuclear dust to the world of Minecraft. Power Armor, Weapons, Dangerous Wasteland Creatures and the ruthless wasteland itself. Mod based on: Fallout 1-4, 76, New Vegas, Fallout mods and cut content. **Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), and [NTGL](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntgl)** **Has compatibility with [CuriosAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)** **Mod currently adds:** - - Wasteland - Food - Plants - Mobs - Biomes - Weapons - Power armor - Radiation system When creating a world, you need to select the "Wasteland" world type in order to generate the mod's biomes. # Addons [![Icon1](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1306/509/64/64/638849485125697689.png) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nuka-additions) **[Nuka Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nuka-additions)** [![Icon2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2WZSN3Yv/bc3466a2fe87722725158c743b90a7e7ade675cb_96.webp) ](https://modrinth.com/mod/vim!-(a-nukacraft-mod)) **[Vim!](https://modrinth.com/mod/vim!-(a-nukacraft-mod))** ![nukacraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxnA5ydI/images/b9bbae8574cc7ef2ba93465cdd4c283bf7aa59fd.jpeg)
